description_long: This is a classic witch hat, characterized by its tall, sharply pointed crown and wide, circular brim. The hat is predominantly black, with two metallic gold bands encircling the base of the crown and the lower part of the cone, adding a touch of elegance and contrast. The surface appears to be made of a soft, fabric-like material, likely felt or a similar textile, with a slightly matte finish. The brim is broad and flat, providing ample shade and a dramatic silhouette. The crown is conical and slightly irregular, giving it a whimsical, magical appearance. There are no visible logos, patches, or additional decorative elements beyond the gold bands.
description: A black witch hat with a tall, pointed crown and wide, flat brim, accented by two metallic gold bands. The surface is soft and matte, with a whimsical, magical style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, pointed crown and both gold bands clearly, with the wide brim fully visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the conical crown's texture and the reflective quality of the gold bands.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the hat's height and the even width of the brim, with both gold bands visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back taper of the crown and the continuous gold bands around the base.
